name: Golden Chicken Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 6 boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a shallow dish.
2. Dip each piece of chicken into the butter mixture.
3. Roll the chicken pieces in the crumb mixture until completely coated.
4. Place the chicken nuggets in a single layer on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 12-15 minutes, or until juices run clear.
6. Yield: about 4 dozen.
